headline: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Air Products and Chemicals (APD) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: Assessing Air Products (APD) Valuation As Hydrogen Boiler And Fueler Technologies Draw Investor Attention
summary: Air Products and Chemicals (APD) is in focus after highlighting hydrogen boiler and portable fueling technologies at the Canadian Hydrogen Convention, putting its decarbonization pitch to heavy industry and transportation directly in front of potential customers. See our latest analysis for Air Products and Chemicals.
